ba8d77a2-9b69-46cf-992a-5a4cd963e80a.name: Lower Gates of the Keep
ba8d77a2-9b69-46cf-992a-5a4cd963e80a.description: On the western side of the fortress, the wall which looms up from the track to the battlemented area has two large, tower-like buttresses. As you round the first of these, you find an impressive gateway occupying most of the width of the wall between them.
ba8d77a2-9b69-46cf-992a-5a4cd963e80a.notes: Adventurers can enter through the lower gates undetected.

features.name: Coat of Arms
features.description: Above the archway, a smooth, shield-shaped panel of stone bears the faded remains of a coat of arms.

exits.label: Southern Gateway
exits.description: The gateway consists of a round-topped arch and has a pair of stone doors with brass handles.

b20a22a5-7ce4-4a29-8780-581e520036c1.name: The Gateway of Berghof
b20a22a5-7ce4-4a29-8780-581e520036c1.description: This is a large and impressive room. The walls and ceiling are of a deep red, lustrous stone, flecked with glittering white inclusions. The floor is of a smooth, pale grey stone and has a large coat of arms inlaid in its center. In an alcove in each corner of the room stands a large stone chair. Three of the chairs are occupied by strange, silent, unmoving figures which appear to be no more than suits of human-sized clothing, arranged as if worn by invisible, seated men. The chair in the south-eastern alcove is empty.

features.name: Large stone chairs
features.description: Positioned in each corner of the room

exits.label: Southern Gateway
exits.description: The gateway leads back to the lower gates of the keep.

exits.label: Northern gateway
exits.description: Identical in appearance to the southern gateway, leads north.

exits.label: Eastern gateway
exits.description: Identical in appearance to the southern gateway, leads east.

fc3aa404-6727-48c5-9a2b-8cc4ac44fe45.name: Toll Room
fc3aa404-6727-48c5-9a2b-8cc4ac44fe45.description: This is a small, plain room. Projecting from the left-hand wall is a long, stone table with a pan-balance mounted on it near the right-hand end. Behind the table are a pair of chairs and a large iron-bound chest against the far wall.

features.name: Table with pan-balance
features.description: The pan balance and its weights appears to be brass

features.name: Iron-bound Chest
features.description: Three locks are fastened on the chest

exits.label: Eastern gateway
exits.description: Eastern gateway leading back to The Gateway of Berghof

e2e53dbb-80b8-435f-a255-6789265bc059.name: Guardian's Hall
e2e53dbb-80b8-435f-a255-6789265bc059.description: This long hall appears to be empty but you cannot see the far end since it is obscured by an uneven screen of a paper-like material. The floor consists of green, red and white hexagonal tiles, each about 6 inches across, laid out in a regular pattern. The walls are pale grey and plain, as is the ceiling.

exits.label: Northern gateway
exits.description: Back to the Gateway of Berghof

exits.label: Paper-like screen
exits.description: A partition of unclear substance and origin

caba1f5f-8876-446c-80c0-cfba1db259a2.name: Guardian's Hall (b)
caba1f5f-8876-446c-80c0-cfba1db259a2.description: Beyond the screen you find another section of the room but the far end is still obscured since there is a second screen. This is similar to the first except that there is a small hole in it near the floor. There are five giant ants working here

features.name: Pile of rubbish
features.description: The floor everywhere is covered in rubbish except near the centre of the room

features.name: Bundles
features.description: Five irregular bundles bound with silk threads suspended from the ceiling: various dead animals

features.name: Hole
features.description: About one foot across, surrounded by the pile of rubbish on all sides

exits.label: Paper-like screen (S)
exits.description: Uneven screen of unknown substance and origin

exits.label: Paper-like screen (n)
exits.description: Uneven screen of unknown substance and origin

825c1784-525a-4a97-b2b3-df3225357161.name: Guardian's Hall (c)
825c1784-525a-4a97-b2b3-df3225357161.description: This is the final section of the room. The far wall bears a vivid mosaic. Lying on an altar-like table below this is the bloated mass of a queen ant.

features.name: Mosaic
features.description: Depicts a large glove of pale leather with a blue stone ring on the index finger.

features.name: Alter-like table
features.description: Appears to have some sort of buttons or knobs inlaid

exits.label: Paper-like screen (s)
exits.description: Uneven screen of unknown material and origin

exits.label: Wooden door (e)
exits.description: Standard wooden door with iron handle

301fe2b0-d37f-4495-8fdf-1242823c9552.name: Painted room
301fe2b0-d37f-4495-8fdf-1242823c9552.description: This octagonal room has a slender, stone pillar near the wall at each corner. The ceiling is painted to represent a domed roof, supported by these pillars, and the walls show a country scene which continues all the way around the room. With a little imagination, you could be standing near a summer house, surrounded by pleasant pastures and woodlands, at the top of a grassy slope leading down to a large lake.

features.name: Wall painting
features.description: Depicts buildings on the SE wall. Paths leading into the horizon are depicted on the NE and NW walls.

features.name: Pillars
features.description: Four slender pillars stand at each corner of the room

exits.label: Painted Door (NW)
exits.description: A door integrated into the painting as leading down a pathway to the horizon

exits.label: Painted Door (SE)
exits.description: A door integrated into the painting as a door to another house

exits.label: Painted door (NE)
exits.description: A door integrated into the painting as leading down a pathway to the horizon

8723bd17-4b1c-4b5d-9a99-bac407ca5d24.name: Release Chamber
8723bd17-4b1c-4b5d-9a99-bac407ca5d24.description: This room is circular and seems to be unoccupied. With the exception of a circular area in the center of the floor, the walls, floor and ceiling are of a smooth pale grey stone. The circular area contains a stark spiral pattern in black and white

exits.label: Stone Door (NW)
exits.description: Ordinary door leading back to the painted room

27da4ff9-dab0-415e-abef-6e0d7aff9b0b.name: Dormitory
27da4ff9-dab0-415e-abef-6e0d7aff9b0b.description: The air in this room is filled with the strong smell of sweat and the sound of none-too-gentle snoring. Much of the floor is covered with straw on which sprawl half a dozen humanoids wearing leather armor. One of them is clutching a flagon.
27da4ff9-dab0-415e-abef-6e0d7aff9b0b.notes:
The sleeping gnolls each have 40d6gp. In addition one of them has a silver mirror (value-200gp) and another hasa rock crystal gem (value - 140gp). 
If the adventurers take the opportunity to search the straw bedding, they will discover the following items: a small ivory ball (value - 300gp), a pair of silver tweezers (value - 10Ogp), and 73gp in coins.

features.name: Straw Bedding
features.description: Straw spread across the floor serves as bedding for the gnolls

exits.label: Stairway to Basement
exits.description: Return to the Painted Room

exits.label: Wooden Door (W)
exits.description: Ordinary wooden door

4f1c3f56-89e5-43d4-ad6c-4ef9c1493d21.name: Defense Room
4f1c3f56-89e5-43d4-ad6c-4ef9c1493d21.description: The occupants of this large room are over a dozen tall grey humanoids with dog-like faces. They are armed with axes and long bows and wear leather armor. As they see you, they rush towards you menacingly.
4f1c3f56-89e5-43d4-ad6c-4ef9c1493d21.notes:
Room 14
Gnoll personal treasures are as follows: leader - 250gp plus a seal (with an eagle motif) made of jasper (value - 600gp); gnolls - 6d60gp each. One has a gold medallion (value - 210gp), and a silver table fork (value - 80gp).

features.name: Tap Mechanism
features.description: Massive device including a large iron cauldron mounted on brackets in a fireplace. A pipe with a tap runs from the cauldron down into an empty trough draining through holes in the floor

features.name: Oil jars
features.description: Seven oil jars sit near the fireplace

features.name: Winch Mechanisms
features.description: Two winches, each with a bell tied on

features.name: Furniture
features.description: three benches, four tables, eight chairs, seven lockers

features.name: Assorted items
features.description: flagons of wine, leather cups, pewter platters, bone dice, bone counters, whetstone, 25 torches

exits.label: Wooden door (E)
exits.description: Ordinary wooden door

exits.label: Wooden door (n)
exits.description: Ordinary wooden door in an alcove on the western side of the room

exits.label: Reinforced wooden door (n)
exits.description: First of two doors situated in an alcove on the eastern side of the room

exits.label: Reinforced wooden door (e)
exits.description: Second of two doors situated in an alcove on the eastern side of the room

dd99e1a3-9892-4d13-a98c-56e4b89de399.name: Gate Watchroom
dd99e1a3-9892-4d13-a98c-56e4b89de399.description: Seated around a small table in the center of this small room are four tall humanoid creatures with grey skins and dog-like faces. Two of them are arm-wrestling while the other two cheer them on.
dd99e1a3-9892-4d13-a98c-56e4b89de399.notes:
Room 15
Personal treasure consists of 4d60gp each. One of them has a bloodstone gem (340gp) and magical black armbands that cure insomnia.

features.name: Small pile of firewood
features.description: Dry firewood

features.name: Bundle of torches
features.description: six torches

features.name: Table
features.description: On the table: large hourglass, slate with chalk

exits.label: Reinforced wooden door (S)
exits.description: Wooden door with iron bands

20ac1220-8be6-4dba-9419-989a9793bb70.name: Stable
20ac1220-8be6-4dba-9419-989a9793bb70.description: This is a stable, with five stalls against the eastern wall. Three of these contain horses which whinny plaintively when they see you. They look under-fed and ungroomed, and the room smells as if the stalls have not been cleaned for many days.

exits.label: Reinforced wooden door (S)
exits.description: Wooden door reinforced with iron bands

exits.label: Wooden door (n)
exits.description: Ordinary wooden door

65929ca6-691e-48a4-a97a-c75c0496ac32.name: Tack Room
65929ca6-691e-48a4-a97a-c75c0496ac32.description: This room has many hooks, pegs and shelves on its walls, but all are bare. Everything in the room, consisting mostly of tack, harness and feed, has been thrown into a large, untidy heap on the floor.
65929ca6-691e-48a4-a97a-c75c0496ac32.notes:
Room 17.
If the adventurers take the time to sort out the heap they will
find 20 sacks of oats, six saddles, 10 bridles, eight saddlebags,
two sets of leather barding, a set of chain barding, 12 saddle
blankets, a small anvil, a small portable forge and bellows,
blacksmith’s tools, horseshoes, nails, four sacks of charcoal,
leather-working tools, combs, brushes, saddlesoap and horse
liniment

features.name: Heap of Tack
features.description: A big pile of horse supplies

exits.label: Wooden Door (S)
exits.description: Ordinary wooden door

64bd649c-d929-4562-8591-09bbf4db8230.name: Death Room
64bd649c-d929-4562-8591-09bbf4db8230.description: This is a plain room, hewn from solid rock, with blackened walls and ceiling. There are many suspicious holes in the ceiling, each about an inch across. There are two doorways, each only five feet high and barred by stout metal gates.

features.name: Northern gate
features.description: Blocks the Stone Staircase exit. Appears to be capable of sliding vertically into slots in the stone.

features.name: Southern gate
features.description: Blocks the Reinforced Door exit. Appears to be capable of sliding vertically into slots in the stone.

exits.label: Stone staircase
exits.description: Stairs lead upward to the second floor, terminating in a wooden door

exits.label: Reinforced wooden door (S)
exits.description: An iron-barred wooden door leading south, positioned behind the southern gate of metal bars.

9ccf9bf1-0040-4e1c-9d95-6c3455bccd50.name: Guardroom
9ccf9bf1-0040-4e1c-9d95-6c3455bccd50.description: Slumped on a bench or lurching around the room are several tall humanoid creatures with grey skins and dog-like faces. Some are swigging from flagons and all are apparently drunk. They have axes and are wearing leather armor with metal plates
9ccf9bf1-0040-4e1c-9d95-6c3455bccd50.notes:
Room 11- 
in a state of great intoxication. If attacked, they will fight to the
death, making no attempt to raise the alarm. They will move
out onto the battlemented platform (area 10) if the general
alarm is raised. Otherwise, they will not notice attempts by the
party to enter the Keep unless they are actually attacked. The
personal treasures of the gnolls consist of 4d60gp each. In
addition, one of them has a silver napkin ring (value - 500gp).
other personal possessions, the only
items of value or interest in this room are 200 arrows in a locker
and a bundle of 25 torches

features.name: Long table and bench
features.description: Placed against the northern wall. Several flagons of ale rest atop.

features.name: The Gauntlet
features.description: The treasure you seek, sitting on the Long Table

exits.label: Reinforced wooden door (n)
exits.description: Wooden door reinforced with iron bars

exits.label: Reinforced wooden door (s)
exits.description: Wooden door reinforced with iron bars. The way out of this adventure for the victorious heroes!
